title: Lox WT gene PCR: amplification from genomic DNA
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"akm58","text":"This protocol is a standard polymerase chain reaction, optimized to amplify a () bp gene flanked by two loxP sites. (?)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"f796n","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4gehf","text":"Refer to page 32, April 5, 2017 entry in Miguel's laboratory notebook for the original document.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"7p36e","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Into a 2.5 mL Eppendorf® tube add: 50 uL H2O 16 uL GC buffer 1.6 uL dNTPs solution 4 uL 10 uM Forward primer 4 uL 20 uM Reverse primer 1.5 uL DNA to amplify (lox) 0.8 uL Phusion polymerase Total=80 uL Add 20 uL into four 0.2 mL tubes --Ready for thermal cycler (vid. step 2).
95*C, 5 min 95*C, 30 seconds 60*C 30 seconds 72*C, 30 seconds 30 X 72*C, 5 min 4*C infinite hold
creator: Miguel Torres
